summary: EXP-155 delivers five patches to the eg-verdicts section in generate-html.js addressing all four curmudgeon holes plus orphaned ISS-910. Key changes: (1) PATCH-1: TLDR refined for counterfactual-test consistency. (2) PATCH-2: Second worked example added — Self-Contradicted vs Misleading priority when dome math contradicts itself AND data is misrepresented. (3) PATCH-4: False-dilemma qualified as compound failure (with WIN-054 as reference case for pure false-dilemma → Not Demonstrated); "actively mishandled" changed to "structurally mishandled". (4) PATCH-5: New paragraph acknowledging tidal WIN counting methodology symmetry. All five issues (ISS-894, ISS-902, ISS-903, ISS-904, ISS-910) are addressed by this single expansion.
